headline: Crans-Montana Constellation fire keeps Bern-Rome relations fractured three months on
summary: The 1 April 2026 Constellation bar fire that killed six Italians still strains Swiss-Italian diplomatic ties.

headline: Swiss watch industry confident despite US tariffs and Mideast war
summary: The Swiss watch federation says tariffs and the Iran war are pressuring exports but it remains optimistic.

headline: Iranian hacking group warns Iran war could go digital and hit Switzerland
summary: An Iranian hacker group says negotiations won't stop the ongoing cyberwar, which could reach Switzerland.

headline: Swiss glaciers cross into net loss as winter snow runs out on 29 June
summary: From 29 June 2026 Switzerland's winter snowpack no longer offsets glacier melt, beginning a net-ice-loss phase amid heatwave.

headline: BIS deputy chief Maechler warns of AI overinvestment and state debt risks
summary: Andrea Maechler of the Bank for International Settlements warns the world economy is wobbling between AI investment frenzy and sovereign debt.

headline: US and Iran trade strikes over Strait of Hormuz, putting June 17 MoU near collapse
summary: Second night of US strikes on Iran after drone attacks on tankers; IRGC fires at US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain; Iran claims 30-day sole control of Hormuz.

headline: Israel strikes southern Lebanon days after signing US-brokered framework
summary: Israel resumes air strikes on south Lebanon two days after a Washington deal; Hezbollah calls it a surrender; one Lebanese killed, one Israeli soldier killed.

headline: Twin earthquakes devastate Venezuela's La Guaira, thousands missing
summary: Satellite imagery shows widespread destruction after twin quakes in Venezuela, with rescue efforts ongoing.

headline: European heatwave: WHO reports 1,300 heat deaths, France sees 1,000 excess deaths
summary: WHO tallies 1,300 heat deaths in the current European heatwave; France records ~1,000 excess deaths; Germany hits a temperature record.

headline: Ukraine says it struck two Russian oil refineries with drones
summary: Ukraine reports drone attacks on two Russian oil refineries, at least two killed, continuing its energy-facility campaign.

headline: Iraq arrests senior officials in anti-corruption raids
summary: Iraqi authorities detained several senior officials in anti-corruption raids.

headline: CVE-2026-58053: Gitea act_runner Docker container hardening bypass (CVSS 9.9)
summary: Gitea act_runner Docker backend leaves dangerous container options enabled despite privileged:false, enabling container escape from a workflow.

headline: CVE-2026-10643: Zephyr RTOS recvmsg() out-of-bounds write (CVSS 8.7)
summary: Zephyr's IP socket recvmsg() miscounts the cmsg header size, allowing an out-of-bounds write via a crafted control buffer.

headline: CVE-2026-58049: FFmpeg RASC decoder out-of-bounds write (CVSS 8.6)
summary: FFmpeg's RASC video decoder writes past row allocation on crafted media, a bitstream-controlled out-of-bounds write.

headline: CVE-2026-8095: WordPress Frontend File Manager arbitrary file deletion (CVSS 8.1)
summary: A case-sensitivity sanitization bypass lets authenticated users delete arbitrary files via the WordPress Frontend File Manager plugin.

headline: CVE-2026-58056: RustDesk file-transfer session authorization scope bypass (CVSS 7.6)
summary: A RustDesk file-transfer session can inject keyboard/mouse input and capture the screen, exceeding its granted scope.

headline: CISA KEV adds Cisco CUCM SSRF and PTC Windchill RCE as actively exploited
summary: CISA's KEV catalog adds Cisco Unified CM SSRF (CVE-2026-20230), PTC Windchill RCE (CVE-2026-12569) and Ubiquiti UniFi OS flaws.
